titlestmt.titleproper: Breast Cancer and Environmental Risk Factors Program records24-19-3783
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Daniel W. Young

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-13 23:10:49 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Breast Cancer and Environmental Risk Factors Program records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Breast Cancer and Environmental Risk Factors Program

did.physdesc: Printed Materials, Publications, Reports, Research Materials
did.abstract: Includes educational publications, grant reports, reprints of research publications, video tapes and CDs on teleconferences and workshops, and materials pertaining to the founding and history of the program.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Program on Breast Cancer and Environmental Risk Factors (BCERF) at Cornell University is devoted to lowering the risk and incidence of cancer by promoting methods of sound decision-making at personal and public levels.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes educational publications, grant reports, reprints of research publications, video tapes and CDs on teleconferences and workshops, and materials pertaining to the founding and history of the program.

emph.ref: Series IV. Meetings, Committees, and Conferences
Series V. Forums, Talks and Workshops

odd.head: General
odd.p: Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/14300

odd.head: General
odd.p: An archived version of the BCERF website can be found at the Internet Archive. http://wayback.archive-it.org/1716/*/http:/envirocancer.cornell.edu/

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Breast Cancer and Environmental Risk Factors Program records, #24-19-3783. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
